rules.corporate_shadows_style: Omni visual style: dark cinematic documentary, image-rich, short generated clips, real images only when high-quality and licensed.
rules.generated_clip_duration_target: Under 8-10 seconds per clip before a beat change or variation.
rules.saints_gate: Build research, scripts, and visual plans now; hold publishing until Corporate Shadows first five have public analytics.
rules.saints_priority: active production focus: research, scripts, visual plans, source-safe episode preparation

the_saints.title: Keep Your Mind in Hell: The Monk Who Survived Despair
the_saints.next_step: Source Silouan icon/portrait, Mount Athos monastery imagery, Saint Panteleimon visuals, manuscripts/prayer visuals; then prepare voiceover.

the_saints.title: The Monastery That Became Russia's Spiritual Hospital
the_saints.next_step: Source Optina monastery imagery, elder icons/portraits, Russian letters/manuscripts, Dostoevsky-era public-domain visuals; then prepare voiceover.

the_saints.title: The Monk Who Crossed the World to Protect Alaska
the_saints.next_step: Source Saint Herman icon, Spruce Island/Kodiak imagery, Valaam/Russian mission route visuals, and mission letters/ledgers; then prepare voiceover.

the_saints.title: The Forest Monk Who Became the Soul of Russia
the_saints.next_step: Source Sergius icons/paintings, Trinity Lavra imagery, medieval Russian manuscript visuals, and restrained forest/bear miracle generated visuals; then prepare voiceover.

the_saints.title: The Athonite Translator Who Rebuilt Monastic Prayer
the_saints.next_step: Source Paisius icons, Athos/Neamt monastery imagery, Slavonic Philokalia/manuscript visuals; then prepare voiceover.
